notes: Starter state: units begin at max HP from rulesets/territory-v1/units.json.
E003 locked starter: max-HP starter board copied from territory-v1 with ruleset id changed to territory-v1-locked.
E005 map-access starter: max-HP starter board copied from E003 and retargeted to sketch-v2-access.
E006 cost-6 starter: copied from E005 access starter and retargeted to territory-v1-cost6.
turn-001: P1 opened the rush by taking northeast and pushing the scout toward the east lane.
turn-002: P2 answered with the west-south scout capture and kept the support line compact.
turn-003: P1 claimed center-east but could not recruit yet under the cost-6 rule.
turn-004: P2 reached center-south but also fell one supply short of a first guardian.
turn-005: P1 converted the fast opening into center control and finally recruited one delayed raider.
turn-006: P2 damaged the exposed center scout and advanced the guardian screen.
turn-007: P1 pressed the center, chipped the lead scout, and spent the stored supply on one delayed scout.
turn-008: P2 kept chipping the center scout and recruited a second guardian to stop the rush count from running away.
turn-009: P1 nearly killed the lead P2 scout with ranged pressure and added another delayed raider.
turn-010: P2 preserved the guardian line and concentrated damage on P1’s forward scout.
turn-011: P1 used the damaged raider to flip northwest and recruited a marksman behind the rush line.
